[File: 'src/ratifiers/EcrecoverRatifier.sol -> Scope: High Non-standard ERC20 behavior, fee-on-transfer behavior, callback revert behavior, or false-return handling that breaks accounting or freezes funds'] [Function: isRatified / take (rebasing loan token)] Can an unprivileged attacker use a rebasing loan token (where balances increase or decrease automatically) in a market gated by EcrecoverRatifier, such that after a rebase-down event, the actual loanToken.balanceOf(midnight) falls below the sum of all withdrawable + collateral + claimableSettlementFee, causing the solvency invariant to be violated without any malicious action by the attacker, and making some lenders unable to withdraw?
